visual_dna.composition: Balanced split layout with strong graphical elements
visual_dna.palette: Space-themed blues (#0044CC) 60%, White (#FFFFFF) 30%, accents of red

strategic_analysis.audience: Space enthusiasts, tech-savvy, 20-40, explorers at heart

image_composition_analysis.focal_points: Primary focus on textual information; secondary focus on graphical elements like logos and QR code
image_composition_analysis.typography_style: Bold and clean sans-serif, high readability

source_analysis.prompt_reconstruction: Digital boarding pass design, space-themed, vibrant blue and white color scheme, NASA branding elements, informational layout, futuristic style, official and exploratory tone --ar 16:9 --style raw

subjects.description: futuristic boarding pass for lunar mission

video_prompt_json.style: official space agency branding, dynamic presentation
video_prompt_json.camera: slow zoom in to emphasize data
video_prompt_json.movement: slight panning across elements, subtle animations on text
